svg.title: Data flow diagram — field-level transformations
svg.desc: Shows how individual CSV fields are parsed, tagged, shuffled, joined, computed, and written as output fields.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does the employee CSV contain?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the payroll CSV contain?')
sendPrompt('What key and value does EmployeeMapper emit?')
sendPrompt('What key and value does PayrollMapper emit?')
sendPrompt('How does Hadoop guarantee all values for the same key go to the same reducer?')
sendPrompt('How does the reducer separate employee from payroll records?')
sendPrompt('How is totalPay calculated in the reducer?')
sendPrompt('How is maxPay tracked across multiple payroll months?')
sendPrompt('Show me a full sample output record from the payroll join')
